patterns.description: Defect rate shows an increasing weekly trend (slope: +0.082 defects/week). Quality is degrading over time.
High vibration (>4 mm/s) combined with high speed (>100 units/hr) drops yield to 86.5% vs plant average of 92.0%.
patterns.supporting_evidence: 442 records with combined high vibration + speed

patterns.description: When Machine vibration exceeds 4.5 mm/s: 24% of defects are 'open' type. Defect rate increases by 111% (avg 5.9 vs 2.8)
patterns.supporting_evidence: 1074 records above threshold vs 8926 below. Dominant defect: open (24.0%)

patterns.description: When Calibration drift exceeds 0.15: 34% of defects are 'pinhole' type. Defect rate increases by 99% (avg 4.4 vs 2.2)
patterns.supporting_evidence: 4125 records above threshold vs 5875 below. Dominant defect: pinhole (33.7%)

patterns.description: When Temperature exceeds 85.0°C: 29% of defects are 'spur' type. Defect rate increases by 84% (avg 5.6 vs 3.1)
patterns.supporting_evidence: 297 records above threshold vs 9703 below. Dominant defect: spur (28.8%)

patterns.description: As calibration offset increases, defect count shows a weak correlation (r=0.386)
patterns.supporting_evidence: Based on 10000 data points with r=0.386, p<0.001

patterns.description: As vibration (mm/s) increases, defect count shows a weak correlation (r=0.335)
patterns.supporting_evidence: Based on 10000 data points with r=0.335, p<0.001

patterns.description: Night shift has 43% higher defect rate than Morning shift (avg 3.92 vs 2.74 defects/reading)
As power consumption kw increases, defect count shows a weak correlation (r=0.225)
patterns.supporting_evidence: Based on 10000 data points with r=0.225, p<0.001

patterns.description: As temperature c increases, defect count shows a weak correlation (r=0.160)
patterns.supporting_evidence: Based on 10000 data points with r=0.160, p<0.001

patterns.description: When Production speed exceeds 120.0 units/hr: 26% of defects are 'spurious_copper' type. Defect rate increases by 32% (avg 4.1 vs 3.1)
patterns.supporting_evidence: 622 records above threshold vs 9378 below. Dominant defect: spurious_copper (25.9%)
